arts.ttl: Unai Emery responds to Diego Carlos criticism and fires Aston Villa warning
arts.sum: I am trying to correct it through video and working with the players on the pitch. Asked how Villa will stop Kane, Emery said: "We analyse the tactical areas collectively and then you have to stop the players.

arts.ttl: Nassef Sawiris has Man City-style plan at Aston Villa amid £930m reveal - Kieran Maguire
Ollie Watkins 'never dreamt' of Aston Villa rise as striker delivers honest Champions League verdict
arts.sum: Ollie Watkins admits he never expected to play in the Champions League with Aston Villa when he signed for the club in the summer of 2020. Asked if he expected Villa to become a Champions League club when he signed, Watkins admitted: "No, not for one minute.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern Munich: Lineups, team news, can anyone replace Harry Kane, and more!
arts.sum: Beating Dinamo Zagreb at home 9-2 was an incredible start, but an away game against a team in top 6 of the English Premier League is a whole different equation. The last time Bayern Munich faced an Unai Emery team with "Villa" in the name, it didn't go so well.

arts.ttl: Unai Emery insists Aston Villa will relish underdog tag against Bayern Munich in Champions League clash
arts.sum: Villa’s first home match in the competition for more than 40 years

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery makes blunt Bayern Munich admission
arts.sum: Unai Emery is expecting Aston Villa to be at their best on Wednesday night against Bayern Munich, the German giants who the Spaniard believes are among the favourites to win the Champions League this season. "If Aston Villa was not playing since 1982 against Bayern Munich then it is not good news," Emery said.

arts.ttl: ‘Always’: Fabrizio Romano says Chelsea are really big fans of £15m Aston Villa player
arts.sum: Chelsea and Aston Villa have both started brilliantly this season. Both teams are, once again, pushing to finish in the top four in the Premier...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa boss Unai Emery ready for ‘special match’ against Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Villa will play their first home fixture in Europe’s top competition since a quarter-final defeat to Juventus in 1983.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs Bayern preview: Cash back in training but won't feature
arts.sum: "Matty is starting training with us, but tomorrow there is no time to get him to play one minute," Emery explained. Unai Emery gave an injury update ahead of Aston Villa's Champions League clash with Bayern Munich.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich in “good talks” with Manuel Neuer, Thomas Müller
arts.sum: It was previously reported that Bayern planned talks with Neuer for the upcoming Spring — but could Müller, too, be in line for one more year after this one? Bayern Munich legends Manuel Neuer and Thomas Müller are inching ever closer to the twilight of their careers.
